hawkish_phrases: a few members expressed concerns about central bank operations continuing to replace the functioning of private markets
concerns were raised about possible undesirable side effects that could arise from moving further into negative territory
recourse to broad-based asset purchases should remain a contingency instrument, to be used only as an ultima ratio
the costs and risks of engaging further in public sector asset purchases would outweigh their potential benefits
further reductions in the deposit facility rate could unduly increase the pressure on banks' profitability
dovish_phrases: a strong case for the Governing Council to reconsider its monetary policy stance and provide further substantial monetary stimulus
downside risks to the medium-term price stability objective had clearly increased
yet another postponement of the date by which inflation was projected to come back into line with the ECB's objective
inflation would not return to the ECB's inflation aim for some time to come
the return of headline inflation to rates below, but close to, 2% would be further postponed
summary: The ECB cut the deposit rate by 10bp to -0.40%, the MRO rate by 5bp to 0.00%, expanded monthly APP purchases from €60bn to €80bn including new corporate bond purchases, and launched TLTRO II, with a large majority supporting the comprehensive easing package amid heightened downside risks to inflation and postponed inflation target achievement.
